- [x] Project structure created for MVP
- [x] Multi-language support (English + Hindi)
- [x] All core components built
- [x] Responsive design implemented
- [x] Documentation complete

## Installation & Setup

Before running the project, ensure Node.js is installed:
1. Download from https://nodejs.org/ (LTS recommended)
2. Install and restart your terminal
3. Run `npm install` in the project folder
4. Run `npm run dev` to start

## Project Overview

**Aadhaar & DBT Awareness Platform** - An MVP educational tool helping students understand:
- Aadhaar-Linked Bank Accounts
- Aadhaar-Seeded Bank Accounts  
- DBT-Enabled Accounts

## Key Features Implemented

✅ Educational Module with 3 core concepts
✅ Detailed Comparison Table
✅ 8 FAQ items with expandable answers
✅ Common Issues & Solutions (4 troubleshooting cases)
✅ Contact Information for helplines
✅ English + Hindi support with RTL layout
✅ Fully responsive mobile-first design
✅ Dark mode support
✅ Accessibility features

## Technology Stack

- React 18.2
- Vite (build tool)
- SCSS (styling)
- Modern CSS Grid & Flexbox

## File Descriptions

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/data/en.js` | All English content |
| `src/data/hi.js` | All Hindi content |
| `src/components/` | React UI components |
| `src/scss/App.scss` | All styling |
| `package.json` | Dependencies & scripts |

## Commands

```bash
npm install    # Install dependencies
npm run dev    # Start development server (port 3000)
npm run build  # Build for production
npm run preview # Preview production build
```

## MVP Scope Completed

This MVP includes:
- ✅ Educational Module
- ✅ Comparison Section  
- ✅ FAQ Section
- ✅ Troubleshooting Guide
- ✅ Multi-language (2 languages)
- ✅ Responsive Design

Not included (can be added later):
- Interactive quizzes
- Advanced status verification tool
- More languages
- Video content

## Next Steps

1. Install Node.js if not already installed
2. Run `npm install`
3. Run `npm run dev`
4. Open `http://localhost:3000` in your browser
